content_body:
The Blue Ridge Experience 

Ahhhhhhh…….August!  The perfect time to come to Blue Ridge. The summer crowds are gone and the pace is much slower, yet all the summer activities and outfitters are still available to enjoy and experience.

Whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River, tubing and kayaking on the Toccoa River, stand-up paddling on Lake Blue Ridge are still in full-swing and waiting to be enjoyed! With all the kids and families back to school in August, you can experience Blue Ridge without tubing “traffic” on the Toccoa River! 

Speaking of less tubing traffic on the Toccoa, if you would like to immerse yourself in the ultimate Blue Ridge Experience, North GA Trout Fishing offers a guided fishing experience second to none. Passionate about fishing and guiding, Joe DiPietro's passion is infectious and he is so good at creating amazing memories as you hook your huge rainbow trout.

 

Things to Do While Staying in Your Luxe Blue Ridge Cabin Rental

We have several cabins where Andrew can come out to your cabin and provide an extraordinary experience. Serendipity on Noontootla Creek is a stunning 5 bedroom/5.5 bath cabin that is perched up on a hillside overlooking Noontootla Creek. Adjacent to this cabin is a ½ mile of Noontootla Creek where Andrew and his crew can help you hook a huge trophy trout. Guided fishing only along this stretch of Noontootla Creek, you will experience the thrill of a lifetime as you learn a new hobby in fly-fishing or hone your skills as a fly-fisherman. Perfect outing for families, couples, or fishermen on a quest!

Located on Aska Road near the historic Shallowford Bridge, perched high atop a mountain overlooking the Toccoa River, Aska Adventure Outpost is one of the most popular summertime cabins as it allows access to the Toccoa River for fishing. Rental tubes are just 1/4 mile down the road, as well as gem mining, and an outpost store for a quick bite to eat and some necessary groceries. A luxury 4 bedroom/3 bath Blue Ridge cabin will certainly delight as you are in the center of everything fun to do. Just 8 miles from downtown Blue Ridge, you can enjoy boutique shops, restaurants, bars, kid games, bike rentals - you name it, Blue Ridge has it!

One of Cabin Rentals of Georgia's spectacular luxury cabins, Cohutta Sunset, a 3 bedroom/3 bath, offers breathtaking panoramic mountain views of the Cohutta Wilderness. Lose yourself in the vastness of these beautiful mountains as you sip your coffee during breathtaking sunrises. What an amazingly refreshing way to start your day. Privately located at higher altitude than most luxury cabins, Cohutta Sunset will certainly exceed all expectations with every amenity provided for your enjoyment. About 20 minutes into downtown Blue Ridge, you are still able to easily experience grand outdoor adventures as well as shop in town for one-of-a-kind treasures.

Take advantage of these amazing August specials and come experience Blue Ridge during a time when the pace is slower and more relaxed. We look forward to having you as our guests!
title: Blue Ridge Cabin Rental Specials in August
